what_it_does: This file stores YAML-frontmatter metadata that registers an image attachment for a design-source channel memory entry, linking it to an image asset via a target URI.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares an attachment id 'att-200892de', channel 'design-source', and attachment_type 'images'.
standouts: Typed image attachment record for the design-source channel.
Target uses an 'image://' URI pointing to 'company-info/p-02'.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of metadata fields.
References media via a custom 'image://' URI scheme.
concerns: No alt text, caption, or description of the image is provided.
The target URI cannot be verified from this file alone.
No author or source context is recorded.
notes: A minimal, timestamped attachment metadata stub that points a design-source channel entry to an image asset by URI.
questions: What visual content does 'p-02' in 'company-info' represent?
Who added this attachment and why?
Does the referenced image asset actually exist and where is it stored?
intention_signals: It appears intended to register an image asset as a retrievable attachment tied to a design-source memory channel, using a URI target for lookup.
novelty: Use of a custom 'image://' URI scheme as the attachment target.
contribution: A typed, timestamped attachment record that links a channel memory entry to an image asset by URI, supporting media provenance and retrieval.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment metadata record that links a design-source channel entry to the image asset at image://design-source/company-info/p-02 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to catalog and make referenceable an image attachment within the design-source channel memory ledger.
